name: Kenova Upholstered Dining Chair with Wood Dowel Legs Cream - Threshold™: Mid-Century Modern, Polyester, Rubberwood
description:
Create an elegant aesthetic in your kitchen or dining area with the Kenova Upholstered Dining Chair with Wood Dowel Legs from Threshold™. This upholstered armchair has a padded seat and a slender backrest that extends forward, along with cut-out designs at the back and sides to create a clean, airy silhouette. Perfect for adding a touch of modern style and luxury to your dining room, this dining chair is wrapped in a textured white upholstery, which contrasts beautifully with the light brown woodgrain frame and shapely dowel legs for an eye-catching look — it can also be used for additional impromptu seating anywhere in your home.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.

Overall Width: 25.4 inches
Overall Height: 30.25 inches
Overall Depth: 19.5 inches
Distance from floor to top of seat cushion: 18.5 inches
Seat Width: 22 inches
Seat Depth: 17 inches
